title: ctc connexions FFP2 Mask 20Pack Disposable FFP2/KN95 Dust Face Masks CE0598 Certified EN149 Standard 5 Layers Filter Protective Mask Individually Packaged
features: 【5-Layer FFP2】The FFP2 MASK is made of 2 layers of non-woven fabric, 2 layers of meltblown cloth, and 1 layer of hot-air cotton. It is breathable and comfortable. Meet FFP2 EN149 standard with Filter Efficiency more than 95%.
【3D Cup Design】CTC connexions Disposable mask puts more emphasis on ergonomic design,ensure the safety and comfort. The 3D cup design expands the breathing space and makes breathing much easier.

【High Elascity Ear Loop】 adult FFP2 mask uses high elastic widening ear loop and adjustable nose clip, which can ensure long-time wearing comfort without pulling the ears. The moldable nose clip allows you to adjust the mask to fit your face closely and prevent eye fogging
[Hygienic individual packaging] 20pcs FFP2 face masks are included in each box. Each mask is individually packed in PE bag to ensure proper hygiene and easy store.

[Qualified Manufacturer, CE Certified FFP2 Mask] ctc-connexions is not only the seller but also the manufacturer of mask so we are providing you the premium quality, favorable price and good service. CTC face masks have been certified by a notified body (number 0598) according to EU FFP2 standard EN 149:2001+A1:2009. The notified body documentation can be downloaded underneath the product picture. You can always buy and use our masks completely rest assured.
description: Product Description FFP2 5-Layer Protective Mask,3d Design That Fits Your Face ctc is the specialized manufacturer of FFP2 Face Mask and we are providing you the premium quality and great service. The FFP2 mask provides ≥95% filtration efficiency, effectively protecting the health of the filtration system. The mask has passed the EU FFP2 standard EN 149:2001+A1:2009, CE 0598 certification. FFP2 dusk masks for protection from dust, pollen and other solid particles. The inner layer of the mask is made of non-irritating material to the sensitive skin Adjustable Metal Nose Clip With the adjustable metal nose clip, you can easily adjust the mask perfectly to your face shape. and prevent glasses from fogging Hygienic Individual Packaging Each FFP2 mask is individually packaged in a PE bag to ensure proper hygiene and easy storage. Each box contains 20 high-filtration masks High Elastic Ear Hook The mask is soft, and the high elastic ear loops fit different face shapes, eliminating ear pressure and bringing you a comfortable experience SGS MODULE B FFP2 B Certification SGS MODULE B FFP2 B Certification SGS MODULE D FFP2 D Certification
